results.title: LKQ Corporation AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
LKQ Corporation, the world's leading provider of alternative and specialty auto parts, is leveraging artificial intelligence across multiple business functions to optimize operations and enhance customer experiences. The company has implemented AI-powered solutions in salvage operations through its partnership with Tractable, enabling automated damage assessment of vehicles for recycling and reuse[1]. LKQ has also participated in innovative supply chain planning initiatives, including Project Zebra with o9 Solutions, which resulted in a 17.3% improvement in forecast value added and reduced the bullwhip effect from 48% to 37%[2]. Beyond operational efficiency, the company has established digital transformation centers in Katowice and Bangalore to develop customer-centric digital solutions, including AI-assisted demand sensing, connected garage management systems, and advanced B2B customer portals[3].

results.title: It’s always energizing to see new talent step into LKQ and immediately connect with the scale, complexity, and opportunity that define our data and technology landscape. Yaksh's reflections after… | Susan Trammell
highlights:
It’s always energizing to see new talent step into LKQ and immediately connect with the scale, complexity, and opportunity that define our data and technology landscape. Yaksh's reflections after just three weeks capture exactly what makes LKQ North America's “passion people” culture so powerful. At LKQ Corporation, we value people who don’t just analyze data, they seek to understand the business engine behind it, embrace the challenge, and lean into the learning curve with curiosity and purpose. That mindset is what fuels our most future‑focused teams, like this one, and strengthens the intelligence layer that supports our operations. Yaksh, your enthusiasm, discipline, and willingness to dive deep with our business partners is already making an impact. It’s exciting to see you bring both passion and precision to the work ahead. This is the culture we have been building: driven, collaborative, and relentlessly forward‑looking. And it’s great to have you on the journey.
...
Data Intelligence Analyst at LKQ Corp | MBA & MS Research/Analysis | Data Science/Stats/Quants | AI/ML ERP Data Migrations | ETL Structures Development/Administration Software Engineering/Development | SharePoint
...
They say you don’t truly understand data scale until you drop into a global supply chain network! Three weeks ago, I joined LKQ Corporation as a Data Intelligence Analyst. I deliberately skipped the standard "Day 1" post because I wanted to actually get my hands dirty and understand the engine under the hood first. My biggest takeaway so far? Data intelligence isn't just about clean rows, columns, and dashboards, it's the active brain behind a massive operational machine or the invisible thread holding that operational machine together. I’m incredibly excited to untangle these complex data puzzles and align technical solutions with our broader business goals under the leadership of Robert Martin. The onboarding transition has been an absolute masterclass, primarily because Andrew Hunt and Wes Blackwood have let me shadow their daily workflows. Navigating a completely new data environment can be overwhelming, but their patient mentorship, system knowledge, and willingness to share their expertise has been invaluable. And of course, a sincere thank you to Sam Bubnack for setting everything in motion and making the recruitment process seamless. Three weeks in, the learning curve is steep, and the runway ahead is massive. Let’s build...!!! . . .#LKQ#DataIntelligence#TeamCulture#ETL#MasterData#SupplyChain
...
Also, excellent job as always, Robert Martin, Wes Blackwood, Andrew Hunt, Sam Bubnack, and our leader of all things data, whether operations, engineering, or intelligence, David Sowers.
...
Data Intelligence Analyst at LKQ Corp | MBA & MS Research/Analysis | Data Science/Stats/Quants | AI/ML ERP Data Migrations | ETL Structures Development/Administration Software Engineering/Development | SharePoint

• Senior Data Architect / Engineering Lead with 15+ years of experience designing enterprise-scale data platforms, modern lakehouse architectures, and mission-critical analytics systems. results.title: Venkat Nikhil K
highlights:
Gen AI Engineer
...
Senior Gen AI Engineer and Lead engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, building, and optimizing LLM-enabled data platforms across AWS, GCP, Azure, and Snowflake environments. Strong expertise in Big Data ecosystems including Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Kafka, Airflow, and dbt, with a focus on building AI/LLM-ready data architectures. Proven experience developing end-to-end ELT/ETL pipelines for structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data, enabling Generative AI, RAG-based analytics, and intelligent data applications at enterprise scale. Hands-on experience with Snowflake data warehousing, including Snowpipe, Streams, Tasks, performance tuning, cost optimization, data governance, and secure data access for AI workloads. Advanced proficiency in Python, PySpark, SQL, and Unix scripting, with experience building LLM-integrated pipelines, AI-driven validation frameworks, and intelligent automation workflows. Extensive experience with workflow orchestration using Apache Airflow, Cloud Composer, and dbt Cloud, supporting AI-driven data processing and real-time analytics. Collaborated with data scientists to productionize AI/ML models and enable LLM-powered applications, supporting both real-time and batch inference pipelines. Expertise in data ingestion from RDBMS, APIs, and streaming platforms using Kafka, Sqoop, Flume, and Pub/Sub, building event-driven architectures for AI and LLM use cases. Experience building real-time and batch processing pipelines using Spark, Dataflow, and Kafka Streams, enabling low-latency data delivery for AI/LLM systems. Strong understanding of data quality, governance, and AI-ready validation frameworks, ensuring reliable and audit-compliant datasets. Built and optimized data pipelines to support AI/ML and LLM workloads, ensuring high-quality, scalable, and low-latency feature delivery. Proven ability to collaborate with business stakeholders, offshore teams, and cross-functional engineering teams to deliver AI-enabled and Agentic AI-driven data solutions, leveraging Python, AWS Bedrock, LangChain, LangGraph, and prompt engineering. Experience across healthcare, finance, insurance, life sciences, and ad-tech domains, delivering LLM-integrated data platforms and Agentic AI workflows supporting advanced analytics and intelligent data applications.

...

* Work on
...
refine storytelling skills

...

...

...
* **Data Analysis & Visualization**: Tableau, PowerBI, Pandas, NumPy
...
* Proven track record delivering AI/ML solutions to customers that get continued usage and drive value

* Deep knowledge of GM’s Data Ecosystem

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.
...
